reviews.comment:
La verdad muy mal servicio por parte del  playero manuel 18:46, no me trato bien cm si no tuviera ganas de trabajar muy mala disposición.  Por culpa de trabajadores asi esq uno se va a otra estación de servicios. Nunca mas vuelvo.

(Translated by Google)
Honestly, the service from the attendant Manuel at 6:46 PM was terrible. He treated me poorly, as if he didn't want to work. He had a very bad attitude. It's because of employees like him that I go to another gas station. I'll never come back.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xGNFkwWTFTek15YkU5dmRtTTRWbVpuVEhoWFFrRRAB

reviews.comment:
Cargo siempre, descuento de acá, muchas islas , nunca tuve un inconveniente. Tiene lugar para estacioar y para tomar café, la comida de estás ypfs. Tiene muchos servicios, como el de lavado, es caro y genérico no hay nada que lo diferencie de otro. Es automático si nunca lo hiciste al menos una vez tenés que ir.

(Translated by Google)
I always fill up, get a discount here, lots of pumps, I've never had a problem. There's parking and a place to get coffee, and the food is from YPF. It has many services, like car washes, but it's expensive and generic; there's nothing that sets it apart from others. It's automatic; if you've never done it, you should go at least once.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2toc1lrVTNVMnhQUVdkM2VFb3hkV0puZEhsbmRFRRAB
